Size=Default, v12 feature flag=False
components.description:
⛳️ v12 feature flags enable new behavior and styling, allowing you to opt-in to new (and sometimes breaking) changes while using the current version.


Feature flags:
enable-v12-structured-list-visible-icons


ℹ️ For selectable structured lists the header and body rows must all have the selectable property togged on. For non-selectable structured lists, the header and body rows must all have the selectable property toggled off.

components.name: UI shell - Right panel
components.description:
UI shell - Right panel

ℹ️This right panel is part of the Carbon "UI shell" - a collection of components shared by all products within the platform. It provides a common set of persistent interaction patterns across products.

components.name: Gradient
components.description:
ℹ️ This component addresses gradients not being natively supported with Figma variables.
ℹ️ To use this component, insert it where a gradient is required and resize as necessary. By default, the gradient is using the background hex code (not variable) from each theme and is a left to right linear gradient with 100% to 0% opacity, respectively. If you need to flip the orientation of the gradient, simply use the keyboard shortcut Shift + H to flip as desired.

components.name: UI shell - Header sub-menu
components.description: ℹ️This header is part of the Carbon "UI shell" - a collection of components shared by all products within the platform. It provides a common set of persistent interaction patterns across products.
